verdicts.reasoning: Production-scale incident (6 stacked pending Tasks for wf-ui-triage); full coalesce spec with query, cancel event, and scoping constraints in learning doc. Remediation is fully implementable from the learning's proposed helper.

Direct cap-burn consequence confirmed in production (operator escalated after 5 wasted cycles). Short-circuit logic is fully specified with three deterministic preconditions and a concrete implementation target (handle_architecture entry-point). Core safety property for the ralph-loop architecture.

Third confirmed member of the stale-code family (deploy-watcher 2026-05-26, subprocess logs 2026-05-21, autoscaler/egress-proxy 2026-06-04). Family pattern established; generalized rule prevents future source-tree-only verification. Remediation is a plan-authoring pattern, not a code change.

Confirmed deadlock incident (task 57598e7a, PR #133, downstream task 4300e935 indefinitely blocked). Core lifecycle invariant with two-part remediation: PR-state guard in accept-as-is path + stuck-task sweep check. High-impact: downstream dependency chains deadlock silently when this fires.
